name: Grasshopper Pie (1)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix chocolate cookie crumbs, sugar, and melted oleo. Line the pie plate with this mixture and bake at 450°F for 5 minutes. Cool.
2. Soften gelatin in cream over hot water. Allow to cool.
3. Beat sugar into egg yolks.
4. Add creme de menthe, cream, and gelatin to the yolk mixture and mix well.
5. Refrigerate until slightly thickened (about 15 minutes).
6. Whip the remaining cream and fold it into the chilled gelatin mixture.
7. Pour the filling into the cooled cookie crust and chill until firm. Optionally, sprinkle crushed mint-flavored chocolate on top.
From the Sharp Hospital, San Diego, CA Christmas Recipe booklet, 1st edition. Circa 1960
